Pin configurations, driver implementations, boot management, Nordic HAL configuration, C array tools, and bootloader scripts.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Pin configurations, driver implementations, boot management utilities, encoding and checksum utilities, boot tests, firmware update handling, memory layout, bootloader, error codes, and system call stubs.
- **[vendor](vendor/README.md)**: Configures and builds the Nordic Semiconductor HAL for the NRF52840 microcontroller.
- **[waftools](waftools/README.md)**: Tools for creating C array headers from binaries, extracting Git info, processing linker scripts, and converting linked targets in a Waf build system.

## Files
- **[boot-bin-update.sh](boot-bin-update.sh.md)**: Updates bootloader binaries for the Asterix platform by building and copying them to a specified directory.
- **[desym.sh](desym.sh.md)**: Executes `arm-none-eabi-addr2line` to translate addresses in `tintin_boot.elf`.
- **[flash](flash.md)**: Bash script to flash a bootloader binary using OpenOCD.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for configuring and building the Asterix bootloader with specific options and tools.
